name: doitoo-games
description: Doitoo Games — a multi-game launcher platform

scripts.dev:mindflow: npx concurrently "npm run serve" "npm run watch --prefix games/doitoo-mindflow"
scripts.dev:multitask: npx concurrently "npm run serve" "npm run watch --prefix games/doitoo-multitask"
scripts.dev:nback: npx concurrently "npm run serve" "npm run watch --prefix games/doitoo-nback"
scripts.dev:numbers: npx concurrently "npm run serve" "npm run watch --prefix games/doitoo-numbers"
scripts.build: npm run build:games && npm run build:platform
